transcript: --ets... you know, I know it's Friday, but you've got to work on that sentence structure. Let's go to Bret on 760--

Well, not after he hurt his... he... he was a hell of an athlete in college.

Yeah, I saw him over the holidays.

Not just comparing Craig Morton, compare any of 'em to him.
